question: Is the background recognizable as the blue sci-fi corridor from the first input image?
Is the Golden Retriever from the second image present in the scene?
Is the Golden Retriever positioned sitting on the corridor floor?
Has the dog's lighting been successfully changed from the original warm indoor tones to cool blue tones that match the corridor?
Is there visible cool-toned rim lighting on the dog's fur consistent with the corridor's light strips?
Are there visible contact shadows on the floor directly underneath the dog's paws?
Is there a subtle, blurred reflection of the dog visible on the corridor floor?
Is the helmet from the third image placed correctly on the dog's head?
Is the helmet appropriately scaled to fit the dog's head (not unnaturally small or excessively large)?
Has the helmet been transformed from a flat 2D illustration into a realistic 3D object with perceptible depth and volume?
Is the helmet visor rendered with a glass-like material property (transparency/specularity) rather than opaque flat color?
Are the specific design elements (flames, wings, stars, text) from the 2D illustration preserved as printed livery on the 3D helmet?
Are reflections of the corridor's light strips visible on the surface of the helmet's visor?
Are the edges of the dog's fur blended naturally into the scene without jagged cutout lines or residual warm-colored halos?
Is the dog's body free from severe distortion, extra limbs, or missing body parts?
